name: Mixed Vegetables in Crockpot
recipeIngredient: 2 packages frozen mixed vegetables (10 oz each)
2 cans condensed cream of celery soup (10 3/4 oz each)
1 pkg. toasted onion dip mix (1/2 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the frozen mixed vegetables in the crockpot.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the cream of celery soup, seasoned salt, dip mix, water, and melted butter.
3. Pour the mixture over the vegetables in the crockpot.
4. Cover and cook on low for 4 to 5 hours.
